attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT XCAPR.AUDIT_RESULT_ID
,XCAPR.AUDIT_QUERY_ID
,XCAPR.AUDIT_NAME
,XCAPR.AUDIT_OWNER
,XCAPR.AUDIT_MONTH
,XCAPR.AUDIT_YEAR
,XCAPR.PID
,XCAPR.DESCRIPTION
,XCAPR.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC
,XCAPR.ERP_SPECIFIC
,XCAPR.SOURCE
,XCAPR.PT_CC
,XCAPR.COUNTRY_GROUP
,XCAPR.US_HTS
,XCAPR.CG_HTS
,XCAPR.CG_DUTY_RATE
,XCAPR.REQUESTOR
,XCAPR.TRAINED_FLAG
,XCAPR.COMMIT_STATUS
,XCAPR.AUDIT_STATUS
,XCAPR.CREATED_BY
,XCAPR.CREATION_DATE
,XCAPR.LAST_UPDATED_BY
,XCAPR.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,
XCAPR.ERP_SPECIFIC_ID,
XCAPR.CUSTOM_SPECIFIC_ID
FROM
 CUBE.XXCFI_CB_AUDIT_POOL_RESULTS XCAPR
 WHERE XCAPR.LAST_UPDATE_DATE  > TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
